# Pull Request

> Note: code contributions are not yet open (Phase 1). If you have a
> recipe proposal, please open an issue using the recipe-proposal template
> instead. Code PRs will be welcomed in Phase 2 alongside the CLA process.

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changes, why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Recipe addition (Phase 2+)
- [ ] Code change (Phase 2+, requires CLA)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I understand this project is AGPL-3.0 licensed
- [ ] (Code only) I have signed the [CLA](../CLA.md) — Phase 2+
- [ ] (Recipe only) The recipe JSON validates against the schema in
      [`../ARCHITECTURE.md`](../ARCHITECTURE.md)
